items.title: Fold
items.description: Fold is a bitcoin rewards company offering a debit card and app for earning sats-back on everyday purchases.

items.title: GetOnZero: Living on the Bitcoin Standard
items.description: A synthesis of Round Rock Bitcoiners meetups on the philosophy, acquisition, deployment, and spending of Bitcoin as primary money.

items.title: Sahil Chaturvedi
items.description: Bitcoiner, designer, and advocate for the #GetOnZero philosophy. Presented the Zero Dollar Manifesto at Round Rock Bitcoiners Meetup #24.
